debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
labels : List α
label : α
⊢ fastCheckMem α inst✝ label (buildBST α labels) = true ↔ label ∈ labels

failed_attempts: simpa [List.mem] using (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))

classical
  induction labels with
  | nil =>
      simp [buildBST]
  | cons a labels ih =>
      have hordered : IsOrdered (buildBST (a :: labels)) := by
        simpa [buildBST] using ordered_addLabel (t := buildBST labels) (label := a) (buildBST_ordered (labels := labels))
      constructor
      · intro h
        have : label ∈ buildBST (a :: labels) := (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST (a :: labels)) hordered).1 h
        simpa [buildBST] using (by
          simpa [buildBST] using this)
      · intro h
        have : label ∈ buildBST (a :: labels) := by
          simpa [buildBST] using (by
            simpa [List.mem_cons] using h)
        exact (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST (a :: labels)) hordered).2 (by simpa using this)
simpa [buildBST] using (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))

simpa [buildBST] using
    (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))
simpa [List.mem] using (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))
simpa using (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))
simpa [buildBST] using (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))

classical
  simpa [fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels))]

simpa [buildBST] using
    (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))

classical
  have hordered : IsOrdered (buildBST labels) := buildBST_ordered (α := α) labels
  have hfast : fastCheckMem label (buildBST labels) = true ↔ label ∈ (buildBST labels) :=
    fastCheckMem_correct (α := α) label (buildBST labels) hordered
  simpa using hfast
simpa [buildBST] using (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))

simpa [fastCheckMem_correct label (buildBST labels) (buildBST_ordered (α := α) labels)] using
    (fastCheckMem_correct (α := α) label (buildBST (α := α) labels) (buildBST_ordered (α := α) labels))

simpa [fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels))] using
    (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))

simpa [List.mem_iff_mem] using
    (fastCheckMem_correct (α := α) (label := label) (l := buildBST labels)
        (h := buildBST_ordered (α := α) (labels := labels)))

simpa [List.mem_iff_mem] using
    (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))

simpa [List.mem_iff] using
    (fastCheckMem_correct (α := α) (label := label) (l := buildBST α labels)
      (buildBST_ordered (α := α) (labels := labels)))

classical
  simpa [List.mem_iff_mem] using (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))

simpa [buildBST] using
    (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels))
      ).trans (by
        simpa [buildBST] using (Iff.rfl : (label ∈ buildBST labels ↔ label ∈ labels)))

classical
  induction labels with
  | nil =>
      simp [buildBST]
  | cons a as ih =>
      simp [buildBST, ih, fastCheckMem_correct, buildBST_ordered]
simpa [List.mem_iff_mem] using (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))
simpa [List.mem_iff] using (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))
simpa [buildBST] using (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))
simpa [fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered labels)]

simpa [List.mem] using (fastCheckMem_correct (α := α) (label := label) (l := buildBST α labels)
    (h := buildBST_ordered (α := α) labels))
simpa [buildBST] using (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))

simpa [List.mem_def] using
    (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered labels))

simpa [buildBST] using fastCheckMem_correct (α := α) (label := label) (l := buildBST labels)
    (buildBST_ordered (α := α) (labels := labels))
simpa [List.mem_iff_get?] using (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))

classical
  induction labels with
  | nil =>
      simp [buildBST]
  | cons a as ih =>
      simp [buildBST, ih, fastCheckMem_correct, buildBST_ordered, LabelledTree.mem, LabelledTree.addLabel]

classical
  simpa using (by
    simpa [List.mem_iff_mem] )
simpa [buildBST] using (fastCheckMem_correct (label := label) (l := buildBST labels) (h := buildBST_ordered (labels := labels)))
